title: IMEEA Large Cooking Spoon 12.8in/32.5cm Kitchen Serving Spoon SUS304 Stainless Steel Spoon Solid Basting Spoon
features: Big Serving Spoon Material: Made of high quality food grade stainless steel, strong and durable. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe.

Frgonomic and Comfortable Design: Featuring an ergonomic handle, the thoughtfully crafted handle allows for better control and efficiency, making these spoons ideal for both commercial and home kitchens.

Effortless Storage Solution: The kitchen serving spoon with loop at the end of this large metal cooking spoon ensures convenient hanging, allowing you to easily store it within reach and save valuable kitchen space.

Versatile and Stylish Utensils: These 12.8" serving spoons are not only functional but also add a touch of elegance to any dining setting. Ideal for buffet lines, catered events, or family dinners, they are also perfect for everyday use.
Cooking Spoon Dimension: Length: 12.8inch/32.5cm; Width : 2.7inch/6.8cm. Net Weight: 145g.
description: Product Description Material Crafted from SUS304 stainless steel, this cooking spoon is durable, rust-resistant. Easy to clean and dishwasher safe. Perfect Length At 12.8 inches long, our cooking spoon reaches deep into pots and pans without hassle, making it ideal for a wide range of cooking tasks. Hanging Hole Design The end of the cooking spoon has hole to ensure convenient hanging, allowing you to easily store it within reach and save valuable kitchen space. Versatile Cooking Utensil This solid stainless steel basting spoon doubles as a cooking spoon and serving spoon, making it a versatile tool in the kitchen.
